captures.chat_api_url: https://api.wrtn.ai/wrtn/v1/chats/{chatId} (chat load GET confirmed); generation send endpoint on same api.wrtn.ai host (POST, streamed) — exact path not byte-captured this run
captures.response_content_type: streaming (assistant text streamed; body taint-guarded). Chat-load GET returns application/json.
captures.transport_protocol: SSE (assistant token streaming inferred); REST/JSON for chat metadata (GET /wrtn/v1/chats/{id})
captures.success_response_wire_sample: GET https://api.wrtn.ai/wrtn/v1/chats/6a18efc133f0c2a4007e4caa -> 200 application/json (chat history envelope). Generation streamed separately. Raw stream body unavailable (Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard) -> CDP/HAR for exact bytes. API host separate from frontend host (wrtn.ai vs api.wrtn.ai).
captures.dom_render_structure: user msg div.css-*._message-sent; assistant div._assistant-message (css-ei2qnj) > div._assistant-message_content > div.chat-markdown; supporter-name label divs (AssistantMessageDefaultLayout_supporter-name). Emotion CSS-in-JS hashed classnames (css-XXXXX).
captures.framework: Next.js + Emotion (CSS-in-JS, css-* hashed classes; #__next present)
captures.console_errors: not separately polled; no functional error. Heavy 3rd-party tracker traffic (mixpanel, GA4, Facebook pixel [one 503 on FB privacy-sandbox], TikTok, Daum, airbridge, MS Clarity, Twitter/X).

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. wrtn worked ANONYMOUSLY — NO /onboarding wall appeared; chat input on home page, redirect to /c/{id} after first send. Benign prompt sent verbatim, assistant (둘른/뉴튼 supporter persona) replied normally. API on separate host api.wrtn.ai (/wrtn/v1/...). First-send chat POST was cleared by home->/c/ navigation; follow-up benign prompt used to surface live endpoints. Very heavy marketing-tracker payload on this page.
